user_message.content: In the current plan, what repetitive tasks can I automate or templatize?

system_message.content:
Based on what I can see in your plan, the items that look like they could be made repetitive (and therefore good candidates to automate or templatize) are:

- Set “No Screens” rule 1 hour before bed (Due: Daily) — this is already explicitly daily, so it’s a strong automation candidate (e.g., recurring reminder/checklist).
- Weekly meeting prep: Slides on experiments (Due: 2026-02-10) — even though it has a single due date here, the wording suggests a repeating work routine you could templatize (same slide outline, same prep checklist).
- Vehicle maintenance scheduling tasks:
  - Schedule oil change and tire rotation (Due: 2026-03-05)
  - Renew vehicle registration online (Due: 2026-03-10)
  These are recurring admin tasks on predictable intervals, so they’re well-suited to recurring calendar tasks and a standard “vehicle admin” checklist/template.
- Track sleep quality for 14 days (Due: 2026-03-01) — this is a repeated daily action over a fixed window, which usually benefits from an automated daily prompt/logging template.

Other tasks in the retrieved list (like sushi practice steps, buying seeds, assembling planter boxes, washing/storing coats, buying a tripod, etc.) read more like one-off project steps rather than recurring routines, so they’re less obviously automation/templating targets from this view of the plan.
system_message.originalQuery: In the current plan, what repetitive tasks can I automate or templatize?
